economic_hypothesis.null: the frozen weekly real-time ADS growth impulse does not improve net weekly SPY/QQQ rotation over the frozen comparators
economic_hypothesis.alternative: improving real-time U.S. business conditions support QQQ growth exposure, while flat or deteriorating conditions favor broad SPY
economic_hypothesis.independent_mechanism_statement: the signal uses the Philadelphia Fed real-time high-frequency ADS composite and is distinct from closed single-indicator macro, financial-stress, funding, settlement, price-volume, calendar and flow lineages
economic_hypothesis.proxy_limitation: ADS blends six indicators and revises its full path; exact historical vintage selection is therefore mandatory, and the frozen four-week inference block is an outcome-blind design assumption rather than proof of sufficient dependence coverage

signal.source: Federal Reserve Bank of Philadelphia official ADS all-vintages archive
signal.decision_time: 09:00 America/New_York on the first accepted XNYS session of each week
signal.latest_allowed_observation: latest official ADS vintage dated strictly before the decision session; within it, latest observation no later than the preceding Thursday
signal.current_measure: current selected-vintage ADS value minus the latest same-vintage value no later than current anchor minus seven calendar days
signal.target_rule: a strictly positive growth impulse selects QQQ at weight 1.0; otherwise selects SPY at weight 1.0
signal.missing_rule: missing or duplicate vintage or observation, nonfinite value, future-vintage leakage, calendar mismatch or insufficient anchors invalidates the interval; no interpolation, current-vintage substitution, alternate source, threshold, smoothing, persistence, source blend or direction repair

execution.entry: next accepted XNYS open after the preceding accepted signal session; the frozen 09:00 decision must precede that open
execution.holding: until the following weekly accepted execution open
execution.decision_price_basis: previous accepted-session raw close, known before the 09:00 decision
execution.corporate_actions: accepted SPY and QQQ cash distributions and split identities are processed by the shared portfolio core

comparator.primary: weekly rebalanced 50/50 SPY/QQQ target notional under identical cost, whole-share, cash, calendar, lifecycle and corporate-action rules
comparator.secondary: weekly rebalanced SPY-only under identical rules

validation_gates: strategy terminal net wealth strictly above the 50/50 comparator
strategy terminal net wealth strictly above SPY-only
arithmetic mean paired active return versus the 50/50 comparator strictly positive
strategy maximum drawdown no worse than the 50/50 comparator
holdout_gates: all four validation-form gates evaluated on the holdout
centered-null one-sided paired bootstrap p-value at most 0.05
uncentered type-7 5% bootstrap lower bound on mean active return strictly positive

inference.method: paired circular moving-block bootstrap over weekly active returns versus the 50/50 comparator
inference.limitation: the prospectively frozen four-week block is an outcome-blind dependence assumption, not proof of statistical sufficiency

stop_rules.validation_failure: permanently close the lineage without holdout access
stop_rules.validation_pass: unlock exactly one retrospective holdout execution
stop_rules.forbidden: no tuning, rerun, threshold or window change, alternate source, source blending, new comparator, changed holding period or post-outcome repair
